description: Optional resource limits, left null until calibrated by real measurements.

max_cpu_time_microseconds.description: Optional positive bound on CPU time; null means unconstrained.
max_cpu_time_microseconds.title: Max Cpu Time Microseconds

max_energy_proxy_units.description: Optional positive bound on energy proxy units; null means unconstrained.
max_energy_proxy_units.title: Max Energy Proxy Units

max_handshake_bytes.description: Optional positive bound on handshake bytes; null means unconstrained.
max_handshake_bytes.title: Max Handshake Bytes

max_peak_memory_kib.description: Optional positive bound on peak memory in KiB; null means unconstrained.
max_peak_memory_kib.title: Max Peak Memory Kib

title: ResourceEnvelope
